metadata.description: Mailchimp authoring skills for Claude Code — custom-coded MCTL templates, multilingual campaign orchestration, qualitative review + multi-template build agents, pre-upload validation.

plugins.name: mailchimp-claude-skills
plugins.description: Toolkit for authoring custom-coded responsive Mailchimp templates (MCTL placement, responsive scaffolding, Outlook hardening, WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility, CSS inlining, pre-upload validator) and orchestrating multilingual campaigns (MC_LANGUAGE field, IF:MC_LANGUAGE conditional content, segments-vs-conditional decision tree, multi-market template forking). Includes a qualitative review agent and a multi-template build agent. Brand-neutral throughout.
